title: Lendova
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Lendova_frg.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] ''Lendova'' during the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Conflict at Mylok IV]].]]
'''''Lendova''''' was a [[Habeen]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] that was involved in a diplomatic mission to bring the Habeen into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] some time during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. At the rendezvous with [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] aboard the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Shamus]]'', the ''Lendova'' was attacked by the four [[Nharwaak]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 Corellian corvettes]] of ''[[Phazer]]'' group.

Thanks in large part to the efforts of [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele's]] [[Starfighter combat/Legends|starfighter combat]] skills, the ''Lendova'' escaped the wrath of the Nharwaak and the diplomatic mission ended in success. It also successfully transferred the Habeen's valuable hyperdrive technology to the ''Shamus''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
